“Deepankar and I were teammates on Petco’s Pricing and Promotion team, where I had the privilege of working closely with him on several Data Science and Analytics projects. These ranged from structuring Petco’s data pipeline to adapting unsupervised clustering algorithms for the company’s pricing needs. Throughout our collaboration, Deepankar consistently proved to be a reliable and insightful partner, demonstrating deep expertise in the business’s inner workings and an eagerness to deliver impact beyond his immediate scope.
...
One standout example of his initiative was a project he led to cluster Petco’s stores nationwide across multiple dimensions relevant to optimizing pricing algorithms. At first, I supported Deepankar in a technical advisory capacity, helping to formulate and implement a clustering model tailored to Petco’s requirements. What started as an advisory role quickly turned into a full-fledged collaboration, as Deepankar ramped up swiftly and began contributing novel ideas to the project within just a few weeks.

results.title: Petco Data Scientist Interview Questions & Guide 2026
highlights:
Petco Data Scientist Interview Questions & Guide 2026
...
PetcoData Scientist
...
# Petco Data Scientist interview questions & guide 2026
...
### What is a Data Scientist at Petco?
...
As a Data Scientist at Petco, you are at the intersection of retail innovation and consumer behavior. Your work directly influences how Petco understands its customers, optimizes pricing strategies, and enhances the overall pet care experience. By leveraging advanced data techniques, you will transform raw data into actionable insights that guide strategic business decisions and improve operational efficiency across the enterprise.
...
This role is critical to the organization because it drives the analytical foundation for Petco’s growth. Whether you are developing complex models to forecast demand or building visualizations to track key performance indicators, your contributions are highly visible and impactful. You will be expected to collaborate with cross-functional teams, requiring both high-level technical proficiency and the ability to articulate complex findings to non-technical stakeholders.

...
### Key Responsibilities
...
As a Data Scientist at Petco, you will spend your time developing reports and visualizations that provide clarity on consumer behavior. You will be responsible for identifying trends, gaps, and opportunities within existing data streams to inform pricing and marketing strategies.
...
Collaboration is a daily requirement. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to ensure that your insights are not just theoretically sound but operationally feasible. Whether you are working on a new customer segmentation model or a pricing optimization project, you are expected to take ownership of the full lifecycle of your analytical projects.
...
### Role Requirements & Qualifications
...
- Must-have skills – A Bachelor’s degree in a quantitative field, demonstrated proficiency in SQL and R, and proven experience in analytical roles.
- Nice-to-have skills – Experience with cloud-based data platforms, advanced visualization tools, and previous exposure to retail or e-commerce analytics.
- Soft skills – Strong verbal and written communication, a proactive problem-solving mindset, and the ability to thrive in a collaborative environment.
...
The Data Scientist role at Petco offers an exciting opportunity to influence a major brand through data-driven strategy. By focusing on your core technical strengths and your ability to communicate complex ideas to a wider audience, you will position yourself as a strong candidate.

Data Engineer at [Petco](https://www.linkedin.com/company/petco-animal-supplies-inc-)

I am a results-oriented Data Analytics Engineer with expertise in designing, analyzing, and optimizing scalable data solutions across Azure and AWS platforms. I specialize in advanced analytics, ETL/ELT pipelines, data validation, real-time streaming, and BI dashboards, enabling organizations to transform raw data into meaningful business insights. Skilled in tools like Azure Data Factory, Azure Databricks, Power BI, AWS Glue, Lambda, and Redshift, I have delivered analytics-driven solutions across cloud-native architectures—ranging from modernizing legacy systems to implementing cognitive and real-time analytics using Kafka, Kinesis, and Spark. My experience spans industries such as retail and insurance, where I have led end-to-end analytics workflows, implemented secure and compliant data lakes, and collaborated with stakeholders to define KPIs, governance frameworks, and actionable use cases that drive measurable outcomes. I am proficient in Python, SQL, PySpark, and Scala, with a strong foundation in dimensional modeling, Snowflake, CI/CD (GitLab), and Power BI administration, consistently bridging business requirements with technical analytics solutions.

results.title: Chad P.
highlights:
Director of Engineering at [Petco
...
### Director of Engineering at [Petco](https://www.linkedin.com/company/petco-animal-supplies-inc-) (Current)
...
As the Director of Engineering for Consumer Knowledge, I lead the team responsible for the beating-heart of customer and pet data for Petco. My mission is to shape raw data into a strategic asset that powers personalized experiences for every pet parent we serve. At the core of our data ecosystem, my teams own the strategy and execution for our Master Data Management (MDM) platform. We architect, build, and maintain the 15+ critical integrations that connect this central hub to every corner of our business—from marketing automation and e-commerce to our loyalty programs and customer support. In 2025, we cleaned up stale and duplicate data by 40% resulting in improvements and cost saving across the organization. The team was recomposed using the team-of-teams framework focused on driving value to the business while reducing our budget by 25%. As a key member of the team that launched our company's AI coding initiative, I champion the use of generative AI to accelerate development, enhance code quality, and solve complex problems more efficiently. We are leading the way to establish a clear, secure, and effective framework for leveraging AI coding tools. Our goal is not to "do AI" for its own sake, but to measurably improve developer velocity and code quality, while ensuring the safety of our intellectual property and customer data. My leadership philosophy is rooted in servant leadership. I believe the most effective way to drive innovation and results is by empowering talented engineers, to act as a force-multiplier for my team, proactively identifying and removing blockages to ensure they can deliver with velocity and excellence. By fostering a culture of collaboration and creative problem-solving, we build resilient, timely, actionable data solutions that drive business growth and deepen customer loyalty. Show less

highlights:
Data Science Analyst | Hirequorum
...
# Data Science Analyst
...
### Position Title: Data Science Analyst
...
Position Location: 654 Richland Hills Drive, San Antonio, TX 78245 – 100% remote position
...
Summary of Duties: Leverage advanced analytical techniques and programming languages to mine through massive data sets and isolate patterns in customer purchase behavior, store performance, and competitive pricing schemes (predictive modeling, clustering, design of experiments, etc.). Work with team members to influence strategic decisions and create accurate financial forecasts based on customer behavior analyses with tangible recommendations to optimize customer acquisition, retention, and lifetime value. Present findings across business by effectively translating complex data and analysis into clear insights, opportunities, and tangible business recommendations. Develop reports, dashboards and build compelling data visualizations that effectively measure, track, and quantify changes in customer behavior and spend patterns. Contribute to complex long-term projects from initial scoping through full execution and training with inputs from a variety of cross-functional teams (IT, Merchandising, Marketing). Collaborate with data science team as expert on the business by providing direction to best leverage advanced modeling techniques and machine learning algorithms to achieve strategic objectives and business goals. Display deep intellectual curiosity, creativity, and commitment to learning in order to solve critical business problems.
...
Qualifications: Master’s degree or equivalent in Data Science, Business Analytics, Statistics or related computational field of study and 2 years of experience in Data Science or Data Analytics. Employer will accept pre- or post-Master’s degree experience. All experience must be post-Bachelor’s.
...
Applicants must have demonstrated experience with the following:
...
- statistical programming languages, including Python.
- transforming large data sets (~20K products, ~25M product-locations, ~10B product-location-days per year) across disparate sources using SQL.
- analytic and data manipulation techniques, including predictive modeling, clustering, classification, and optimization algorithms to uncover patterns and drive strategic initiatives.
- leveraging business intelligence tools (to include Looker or MicroStrategy) to design and build interactive dashboards that drive data-driven decision-making.
- using Python and R packages to develop presentations of data findings (including insights, opportunities, and business recommendations) for senior management.
- version control systems, code reviews, and collaborative development in team environments.
- defining and monitoring key performance indicators (KPIs) to evaluate business performance and guide strategic decisions.

results.title: [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II | Wfh
highlights:
# [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II
...
Note: The job is a remote job and is open to candidates in USA. Cotiviti is a healthcare technology company focused on delivering better care at lower costs through advanced technology and data analytics. The Senior Generative AI Scientist II will work with a team to solve healthcare issues using machine learning and AI techniques, delivering value through innovative data solutions. Responsibilities • Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Business Operations, along with Product Management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques • Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases • Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work • Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA • Work with ML Ops/Production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance • Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform • Participate in other data science initiatives, collaborating with your peers to support their projects • Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team • Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption • Complete all responsibilities as outlined in the annual performance review and/or goal setting • Complete all special projects and other duties as assigned • Must be able to perform duties with or without reasonable accommodation Skills • Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI • Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases • 5+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU • Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP • Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets • Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus • Flexibility to work with global teams as well geographically dispersed US based teams • Professional with ability to properly handle confidential information • Ability to work within a matrixed organization • Proficiency in all required skills and competencies above Benefits • Medical • Dental • Vision • Disability • Life insurance coverage • 401(k) savings plans • Paid family leave • 9 paid holidays per year • 17-27 days of Paid Time Off (PTO) per year, depending on specific level and length of service with Cotiviti. Company Overview • Cotiviti enables healthcare organizations to deliver better care at lower cost through advanced technology and data analytics that improve the quality and sustainability of healthcare in the United States. It was founded in 1979, and is headquartered in South Jordan, UT, US, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is Company H1B Sponsorship • Cotiviti has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 165 in 2025, 118 in 2024, 90 in 2023, 102 in 2022, 72 in 2021, 67 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.

As a principal machine learning engineer, you will be responsible for fine-tuning state-of-the-art LLMs for diverse use cases while optimizing models for high-performance deployment on Airbnb’s ML Infrastructure. You will partner with product managers, software engineers, data scientists and operation teams to brainstorm, design and develop AI products such as AI Assistant, Autonomous agent, recommendation, travel planning, and many more products that make meaningful impacts in the world of travel.
...
- Work with large scale structured and unstructured data; explore, experiment, build and continuously improve foundation models for Airbnb product, business and operational use cases.
...
- Create a multi-year tech roadmap that enables our team to stay on the leading edge of the rapidly evolving AI landscape and leverage the best in class technologies to deliver customer benefits.
...
- Continuously evaluate recent and upcoming large foundational models, ensuring the selection and refinement of the highest quality models for enhanced performance and efficiency.
...
- Hands-on prototype, develop and productionize LLM models and pipelines at scale, including both batch and real-time use cases.
...
- Drive key AI architectural decisions for products, and contribute to Airbnb’s ML platform architecture and strategy.
...
- Minimum Qualifications:
...
- PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Mathematics, Statistics, or related technical field.
- 10+ years of experience with developing machine learning models and products at scale from inception to business impact.
...
- Programming experience in Python and hands-on experience with frameworks such as PyTorch.
...
- Proven record of training, fine tuning, optimizing models and inference run-time
...
- Post-training experience in areas like data processing for fine-tuning; responsible LLMs; LLM alignment; reinforcement learning; efficient training and inference; language model evaluation; and/or multilingual and multimodal modeling.
...
- Or specialized experience in runtime optimizations, model quantization, compression, on-device inference, GPU inference, pytorch, kernel development
...
- Preferred Qualifications:
...
- PhD in AI, machine learning, data science, or related technical fields.
...
- Publications at peer-reviewed AI conferences (e.g., NeurIPS, CVPR, ICML, ICLR, ICCV, and ACL).
...
- Customer Support Systems: Experience with AI technologies in customer support applications.
...
- Agile Practice for AI production: Experience with the entire AI product development lifecycle from incubation to production at scale, following agile practices in the Applied AI/ML domain.
...
- Infrastructure Acumen: Experience deploying and scaling business-critical AI services and driving architectural requirements on ML infrastructures
